title: Lesson Record
description: Canonical model for a deserialized SQLite lesson row. All fields match DB column names exactly.

id.description: ULID — collision-free, naturally sorted by creation time

slug.description: Human-readable kebab-case slug + 4-char random suffix. Used in dedup claim filenames, log output, and CLI references.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Only 'active' and 'disabled' lessons appear in the manifest.

type.description: Authoritative injection behavior. hint: context injection at PreToolUse. guard: deny the tool call. protocol: session-start only. directive: session-start only (mandatory).

summary.description: One-line description. Used as fallback injection when full message exceeds budget.

problem.description: Root cause explanation. Describes the failure mode, not just the symptom.

solution.description: Concrete fix. Actionable commands or code changes. Should be copy-pasteable.

toolNames.description: Tools this lesson applies to. First-pass filter at hook time. Empty for protocol/directive lessons (injected globally at session start).

commandPatterns.description: Regex patterns tested against Bash tool_input.command.

pathPatterns.description: Glob or regex patterns tested against file_path for Read/Edit/Write/Glob tools.

priority.description: 1-3: Low (rare, heuristic-only). 4-6: Medium (validated, situational). 7-8: High (common recurring). 9-10: Critical (hangs, data loss).

confidence.description: How sure we are this is a real, recurring pattern. >=0.9: manually curated. 0.7-0.9: strong heuristic. <0.7: needs review.

tags.description: Datadog-style labeled tags. Categories: lang:, tool:, topic:, env:, severity:, platform:

source.description: How this lesson was discovered. structured: parsed from #lesson tags. heuristic: sliding-window pattern detection. manual: hand-authored.

sourceSessionIds.description: Sessions where this pattern was observed. Empty for manually authored lessons.

occurrenceCount.description: Times the scanner detected this pattern across all sessions.

sessionCount.description: Number of distinct sessions this pattern was seen in.

projectCount.description: Number of distinct projects this pattern was seen in.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of (problem + solution + triggers). Used by scanner for dedup.

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when lesson was reviewed. Null for unreviewed candidates.

archivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when lesson was archived. Null if not archived.

archiveReason.description: Optional explanation for why the lesson was archived.
